acceptance_criteria.when: greet(name:) is called with an empty string ""
greet() is called with no arguments

acceptance_criteria.then: Greeter and both greet methods are public and accessible
acceptance_criteria.when: it is referenced from a test target via @testable import Greeter

items.description: Public struct/class `Greeter` with method `greet(name: String) -> String` returning "Hello, <name>!" and `greet() -> String` returning "Hello, world!"
